SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureResult.ReleaseEstimate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureResult.ReleaseEstimate
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
PipeFireRuptureResult
public static final class PipeFireRuptureResult.ReleaseEstimate extends Object implements Serializable
Spreadsheet-style release estimate at rupture.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReleaseEstimate

      public ReleaseEstimate(double longPipeGasTwoSidesKgPerS, double longPipeGasOneSideKgPerS, double shortPipeGasOneSideKgPerS, double liquidOneSideKgPerS, double gasTemperatureC, String basis)
      Creates a release estimate.
      Parameters:
      longPipeGasTwoSidesKgPerS - long-pipe gas release from two sides in kg/s
      longPipeGasOneSideKgPerS - long-pipe gas release from one side in kg/s
      shortPipeGasOneSideKgPerS - short-pipe gas release from one side in kg/s
      liquidOneSideKgPerS - liquid release from one side in kg/s
      gasTemperatureC - gas temperature used in the release estimate in degrees Celsius
      basis - calculation basis text

  • Method Details

    • getLongPipeGasTwoSidesKgPerS

      Gets long-pipe gas release from two sides.
